title: Add RunOutput.WrapupAgentStep method for agent wrapup step progress
description:
Add a method to internal/output/output.go for reporting agent wrapup step progress:

func (o *RunOutput) WrapupAgentStep(index, total int, title, status string)

Terminal output: '  [2/3] Review changes... done' or '  [2/3] Review changes... failed'
Board: broadcast as wrapup_agent_step event.

This is a small, real gap — the agent wrapup steps currently have no output method in RunOutput.

Files: internal/output/output.go, internal/output/output_test.go
closed_reason: Added WrapupAgentStep(index, total, title, status) method to RunOutput. Terminal prints '  [2/3] Review changes... done' format, suppressed in JSONL mode. Board broadcasts as wrapup_agent_step event with index/total/title/status data. Added 4 tests covering terminal output, JSONL suppression, board broadcast, and nil-sink safety.
